items.name_en: Dynamic Chip M45256 Black M45306 Blue M46526 Milky White Top-tier Original M45307 Milky White with Brown Top-tier Original NéoNoé Medium Tote Bag Crafted from Monogram Empreinte embossed leather, it exudes elegance with leather drawstrings and delicate eyelets. The lightweight structure fits the body's rhythm, cleverly using a removable top handle or detachable and adjustable shoulder strap for a comfortable experience whether carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody.

Top-tier Original Order. This Dopp Kit wash bag is made of Monogram Eclipse coated canvas, offering a subtle choice for Monogram lovers. Ample space to store travel essentials, double zippers provide secure protection, and a wide opening makes it easy to access items.
	•	Monogram Eclipse coated canvas
	•	Washable fabric lining
	•	Metal hardware
	•	Double zipper closure with magnetic flap cover
	•	Ample capacity
	•	Wide opening

This Dopp Kit wash bag is crafted from fine-grain Taurillon Monogram leather, allowing you to carry toiletries and other personal items elegantly. The bag features a spacious capacity, double zipper closure, and a washable lining, combining style and practicality. This accessory makes a thoughtful gift and perfectly complements any travel bag. Detailed Dimensions: 28 x 15 x 16.5 cm

items.name_cn:
Earth Yellow·
LE 5À7 Series New Bucket Bag with Handle_New shape, made of Italian calfskin. The bag features a simple, structured silhouette that looks structured yet not too sharp. It has metal studs at the bottom and a classic metal logo insert buckle. The overall look gives a unique blend of classic elegance and modern chic!
Model: 742828
Size: 26×20×12cm

items.name_en: ELLIPSD Series M46196 Uninspected Version#
items.name_cn:
ELLIPSD Series M46196 Uninspected Version#
▪Size: 28*21*8cm▪
Ellipse series, a 'clam bag' with unique design elements.
Featuring classic vintage print combined with unique lines for a striking look.
Open at the back, prioritizing practicality with capacity suitable for daily outings!
Versatile carrying methods: hand, crossbody, or shoulder!
Gets better the more you look at it, eye-catching for daily wear with a full retro vibe!
